nasb.text: You give to them, they gather it up; You open Your hand, they are satisfied with good.

esv.text: When you give it to them, they gather it up; when you open your hand, they are filled with good things.

cnv.text: 你賜給牠們，牠們就拾取； 你張開你的手，牠們就飽享美物。

ccb.text: 它们从你那里得到供应， 你伸手赐下美食， 使它们饱足。

csbs.text: 你赐给它们，它们就收取； 你张开手，它们就饱享美食。
